name: Iconize Reloader
description: Watches obsidian-icon-folder/data.json and refreshes Iconize in place (reloads its data and re-paints the file-explorer) when the file changes externally — no plugin toggle, no window reload. Also surgically aligns Notebook Navigator's frontmatter settings (useFrontmatterMetadata + icon/color field names) with the same namespace when present. Cross-platform: desktop uses fs.watch; mobile relies on Obsidian's metadataCache for folder-note frontmatter changes.
author: local
